rationale: Diff contains only execution manifest/result metadata for the bead attempt — no implementation of the proposed-policy delta matrix, no policy-authoring.spec.ts changes, and no UI/code changes addressing any acceptance criteria.

findings.summary: No implementation diff: only .ddx/executions/.../manifest.json and result.json were added. The acceptance criteria (matrix surfaces changed allow/deny/needs_approval, redacted/denied field deltas, policy_filter_unindexed remediation, 'unchanged' rendering, and 'transaction delta unavailable' affordance) require code and spec changes that are absent.
policy-authoring.spec.ts is not modified or created in this diff, so no test proves AC behavior.
Bead is annotated BLOCKED [2026-04-27]: intractable after 4 attempts with exponential backoff; recent attempts show 'no_changes' / exhausted tiers, consistent with the empty implementation diff.
